East West University, Georgia

# Georgia

East West University, Georgia

East-West University, located in Tbilisi, Georgia, is a private institution founded in 2012. It offers undergraduate and graduate programs in business, economics, law, humanities, and social sciences. The university emphasizes innovative teaching, experienced faculty, and modern facilities to support student growth. With a focus on interdisciplinary education and practical skills, East-West University prepares students for global challenges and societal impact.

Overview of East West University, Georgia

Ranking of East West University, Georgia

The university is ranked 11,197 globally and 31st in Georgia, but its ranking in Asia is not available.

Why Choose East West University, Georgia?

East-West University, based in Tbilisi, Georgia, is renowned as one of Europe’s leading medical universities, offering contemporary medical education through interdisciplinary teaching, global partnerships, and advanced technology. The university’s medical school collaborates closely with prominent Georgian institutions such as Aleksandre Aladashvili Clinic and Tbilisi Balneological Resort to deliver comprehensive clinical training.

Established with support from the American University in Washington D.C. and the American University Global Peace Centre, East-West University aims to provide top-tier medical programs across Europe. The university has implemented modern teaching standards under the EU-funded Tempus (Erasmus +) project (e-PBL-net), striving to establish international best practices in medical education within the region

Accreditation & Recognition of East West University, Georgia

East-West University holds accreditation from recognized bodies that ensure the credibility and acceptance of its degrees, particularly important for Indian medical students studying abroad. These accreditations include:

  • Medical Council of India (MCI): Essential for Indian medical graduates to practice in India.
  • Accredited by World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS): Ensures international recognition of medical qualifications.
  • European Association for Quality Assurance in Higher Education (ENQA): Guarantees quality assurance in higher education.
  • European Quality Assurance Register for Higher Education (EQAR): Recognizes compliance with European standards.
  • Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB): Accreditation for business schools ensuring academic excellence.
  • International Accreditation Council for Business Education (IACBE): Accreditation specific to business education.
  • Accreditation Council for Business Schools and Programs (ACBSP): Ensures quality business programs.
  • Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (CIMA): Accreditation for management accounting education.
  • Accreditation Board for Engineering and Technology (ABET): Ensures quality standards in engineering education.
  • Accreditation Agency for Study Programmes in Engineering, Informatics, Natural Sciences and Mathematics (ASIIN): Accreditation specific to engineering, informatics, natural sciences, and mathematics programs.

These accreditations validate East-West University’s commitment to academic excellence and ensure that its degrees meet international standards and are recognized globally, including in India.

These affiliations underscore the university’s commitment to global medical education standards and collaboration within the international medical community.

Eligibility Criteria for East West University, Georgia

Eligibility criteria for admission to East-West University, Georgia include academic qualifications, proficiency in English, NEET qualification, age requirements, and specific document submissions.

  • Academic Qualifications: Completion of higher secondary education (10+2) with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English as core subjects. Minimum aggregate score typically required.

  • University Test: Admission involves an online interview or test with university officials.

  • NEET Qualification: Must clear the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) conducted by NTA for admission.

  • Language Proficiency: Proficiency in English is necessary. Applicants may need to take an English test (like IELTS or TOEFL), unless exempted based on prior English-medium education or qualifying exam scores.

  • Age Limit: Minimum age requirement is usually 17 years; upper age limit may apply.

  • Document Requirements: Includes academic transcripts, NEET scorecard, passport copy, birth certificate, and other relevant certificates.

  • Visa Requirements: Upon acceptance, students must apply for a Georgian student visa, requiring additional documentation such as proof of financial support and medical insurance.

Duration of MBBS at MBBS at East West University, Georgia

The Medicine program at East-West University is a 5+1 year undergraduate program divided into three stages:

Preclinical Stage (Years 1-2):

  • Foundational courses in basic sciences: anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, and pathology.
  • Development of clinical skills through simulated patient encounters and laboratory sessions.

Clinical Stage (Years 3-5):

  • Rotation through medical specialties: internal medicine, surgery, pediatrics, obstetrics and gynecology, psychiatry.
  • Opportunities for research projects and elective rotations.

Internship (Year 6):

  • Hands-on experience in a hospital or healthcare facility.
  • Application of knowledge and skills in a real-world setting.
  • Preparation for licensure and professional practice.

Documents Required Admission For MBBS at East West University, Georgia

East-West University requires several key documents for admission, ensuring all applicants meet the necessary qualifications and standards. These documents include:

  • 10th Marksheet: Proof of completion of secondary education.
  • 12th Marksheet: Confirmation of higher secondary education completion.
  • NEET Scorecard: Mandatory for Indian students, demonstrating eligibility via the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test.
  • Passport: Valid identification for international students.
  • Passport Size Photo: Recent photograph for official records.

These documents are essential to verify academic readiness and eligibility, ensuring a smooth application process for prospective students.

Facilities at East-West University, Georgia

East-West University offers a comprehensive range of facilities designed to support students’ academic, personal, and professional growth.

  • Modern classrooms equipped for interactive learning.
  • Extensive library resources for academic research.
  • Well-equipped laboratories for practical experiments.
  • Advanced computer facilities for students’ technological needs.
  • Clinical training centers for hands-on medical practice.
  • Simulation laboratories for realistic medical scenarios.
  • Access to a range of medical equipment.
  • Anatomy dissection labs for in-depth study.
  • Student accommodation options available.
  • Dining facilities offering diverse culinary options.
  • Recreation centers for leisure and social activities.
  • Sports facilities for physical fitness and recreation.
  • Health services available on campus.
  • Counseling services for academic and personal support.
  • Career development center for job readiness.
  • Language learning support for non-native speakers.
  • Cultural associations and clubs promoting diversity.
  • Transportation services for convenient travel.
  • Dedicated support for international students.
  • Research center fostering academic inquiry.

Student Life at East West University, Georgia

At East-West University, Georgia, student life is vibrant and enriching, offering a supportive community where students from diverse backgrounds thrive. With modern facilities, cultural clubs, and recreational opportunities, students can balance academic pursuits with social and personal growth. The university fosters a dynamic environment that encourages collaboration, leadership development, and lifelong friendships, ensuring a fulfilling experience beyond the classroom.
